name: Irish Golf Academy
about: Irish Golf Academy is a golf training studio located within Spot 29, offering indoor golf simulation and professional coaching services. The facility features 3 Trackman simulators for year-round play, allowing golfers to experience 18 holes in approximately two hours on courses worldwide. The academy provides individualized coaching using Trackman Radar technology, video analysis, and on-course observation to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game. Additional services include club fittings, junior memberships, and group event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman's dual radar system provides highly accurate ball flight tracking with real spin and distance data
Year-round indoor play regardless of weather conditions with weather-protected hitting bays
Professional coaching using advanced video analysis technology for personalized swing improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple Trackman simulators available, specific model not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or must be brought by the golfer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about outside food and drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can golf 18 holes in approximately two hours on the Trackman simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior memberships and specifically mentions kids in its target audience.
